title: A Netflix cooking show is changing how people travel — and restaurants are seeing bookings jump 303%
summary_full: Asia's food tourism scene attempts to angle itself between gourmet and authentic street food. Netflix show "Culinary Class Wars" replicates this contradiction.
summary_public: Asia's food tourism scene attempts to angle itself between gourmet and authentic street food. Netflix show "Culinary Class Wars" replicates this contradiction.
